current_sprint.name: Sprint 4 — Pilot Launch (Vejle, 5 clients)
current_sprint.notes: Pipeline fully operational at 1,179 domains. Client SQLite DB implemented (11 tables, 150 tests). Telegram delivery bot built (operator approval flow, auto-send toggle). PR #14 open. Client onboarding and bot containerization not started.

completed_sprints.name: Sprint 1 — Consolidate & Ship
completed_sprints.notes: 153 tests, structured logging, benchmarks, merged to main

completed_sprints.name: Sprint 2 — Docker Architecture (Pi5)
completed_sprints.notes: 204 domains in 8.5 min (9x improvement). Subfinder batch enrichment, local CT database, observability stack. 217 tests.

completed_sprints.name: Sprint 3 — Consent-Gated Pipeline (3.0-3.5)
completed_sprints.notes: Results API, consent management, Layer 2 scanners (Nuclei/CMSeek), finding interpreter, message composer, client memory, digital twin, mobile console, deployment hardening. 500 tests. All versions pinned. Smoke test integrated into pipeline command.

milestones.name: Docker smoke test (Sprint 3.5)
milestones.notes: 19 checks: Go binaries, templates, CMSeek, app code, imports. Integrated into heimdall-pipeline.

milestones.name: Export script tests (Sprint 3.5)
milestones.notes: 11 tests: CSV schema, CVR enrichment, contactable field, graceful fallbacks.

milestones.name: Version pinning (Sprint 3.5)
milestones.notes: CMSeek commit 20f9780, Nuclei v3.7.1, httpx v1.9.0, webanalyze v0.4.1, subfinder v2.13.0, dnsx v1.2.3.

milestones.name: WPScan sidecar replaced with WPVulnerability API
milestones.notes: WPVulnerability API + local SQLite cache. No Ruby sidecar. Docs updated across CLAUDE.md, SCANNING_RULES.md, briefing.md.

milestones.name: CVR enriched database operational
milestones.notes: 5.6MB SQLite deployed to Pi5 via git. Scheduler auto-detects, skips legacy Excel pipeline. 1,179 domains loaded.

milestones.name: WordPress plugin detection parity with competitors
milestones.notes: HTML ver= extraction, REST API namespace enumeration, meta generator parsing, CSS class signatures, slug_map.json merge, WordPress.org API latest-version checks.

milestones.name: OSINT agent created
milestones.notes: Web fingerprinting knowledge base. 13 agents total.

milestones.name: Full pipeline at scale (1,179 domains)
milestones.notes: Running on Pi5. Previous: 10 restaurants-only. Local CSV export shows 210 briefs from partial/test run. Awaiting full 1,179-domain completion.

milestones.name: Client SQLite DB implemented
milestones.notes: 11 tables, 9 views, 34+ indexes. src/db/ module with full CRUD. DB-backed delta detection. Worker hook saves scan results to DB. 92 tests. PR #14.

milestones.name: Telegram delivery bot (Sprint 4, Increment 4.1)
milestones.notes: Bot setup, operator approval flow (inline keyboard), message sender with retry, delivery runner (Redis pub/sub). python -m src.delivery. 58 tests. PR #14. Not yet containerized.

milestones.name: Client onboarding — first 5 Vejle businesses (Sprint 4, Increment 4.2)
milestones.notes: Real clients, real scans, real messages. Free first month. No onboarding workflow exists. Need to register telegram_chat_id per client.

milestones.name: Tailscale remote access (Sprint 4)
milestones.notes: Remote console, Grafana, Dozzle access. Soft dependency.

milestones.name: Finding Interpreter integration with Claude API
milestones.notes: Interpreter code exists (src/interpreter/) but not wired to live pipeline. Needs Claude API key in prod. Finding confidence split (Confirmed vs Potential) queued.

milestones.name: Finding confidence split (Confirmed vs Potential)
milestones.notes: Decision made: Option C. Affects interpreter, composer, Telegram templates. Queued for interpretation sprint.

external_deadlines.name: Lawyer consultation — outreach legal questions
external_deadlines.notes: Was scheduled for week of 2026-03-31. 16 questions prepared. Outcome determines viable outreach channels. Status unknown.

external_deadlines.name: Startup Denmark (SIRI) application
external_deadlines.notes: Ready for final review and submission. Video pitch script still unwritten (mandatory).

external_deadlines.name: NCC-DK grant application
external_deadlines.notes: Requires CVR from SIRI approval. 13 days remaining. Likely miss unless SIRI submitted immediately.

pipeline_run.bucket_a_sample: jellingkro.dk (39 findings), conrads.dk (15 findings), hosingeborg.dk (9 findings)
pipeline_run.notes: Full 1,179-domain pipeline running on Pi5. Client DB now saves scan results via worker hook.

blockers.description: Lawyer consultation outcome unknown — determines viable outreach channels
blockers.notes: Physical letters and phone removed. If email/contact-form also restricted, no outreach path to clients.
Pending rotation since 2026-03-30. Security debt accumulating.

next_actions: Onboard first test client with telegram_chat_id
Finding Interpreter wired to live pipeline (Claude API in prod)
Finding confidence split implementation (Confirmed vs Potential)
Confirm lawyer consultation outcome — outreach channels
follow_ups: Non-WordPress passive detection (SPF/DKIM/DMARC, cookie security, JS library versions)
Threat feed integration: abuse.ch URLhaus + WHOIS domain age
Retire src/client_memory/ JSON module (once all consumers migrated)
